appmesh.virtualnode.listener.ConnectionP.Description: The connection pool information for the listener.

appmesh.virtualnode.listener.HealthCheck.Description: The health check information for the listener.

appmesh.virtualnode.listener.OutlierDete.Description: The outlier detection information for the listener.

appmesh.virtualnode.listener.PortMapping.Description: The port mapping information for the listener.

appmesh.virtualnode.listener.Timeout.Description: An object that represents timeouts for different protocols.

appmesh.virtualnode.listener.TLS.Description: A reference to an object that represents the Transport Layer Security (TLS) properties for a listener.
